lesson: A hill makes an angle θ with the horizontal surface. A truck of mass m is driving up the hill, as shown. Assume there is no friction between the truck and the hill, and take g = 9.8 m/s^2. (a) Find Ftotal, the magnitude of the sum of all forces acting on the truck. (b) Find N, the magnitude of the normal force exerted by the hill on the truck.
